comment: Special spell domains: themed groups of spells at the intersection of two elements. Domain spells are not available in normal guilds — they are learned exclusively through rare map events tied to each domain. Future metaprogression may unlock them for guild purchase or attach domain-specific perks.

crystal.name: Crystal
crystal.theme: Clarity, resonance, precision. Crystal focuses and reveals.
crystal.description: Where earth is compressed to perfection by space, crystal grows — ordered, resonant, and perfectly transparent. Crystal magic is a discipline of clarity: it reveals what hides, focuses the mind to a razor edge, and defends by refracting rather than absorbing. The Crystal Guardian is its emblem: patient, immovable, and lethal at a distance.

glass.name: Glass
glass.theme: Precision, fragility, reflection. Glass wounds and reveals.
glass.description: Where earth is seized by air and made impossibly thin, glass is born — transparent, silent, and lethal when broken. Glass magic is precise and reactive: a shard in the dark, powder in the eyes, a globe that waits to shatter. It punishes the enemy for coming close and the ally for taking hits.

smoke.name: Smoke
smoke.theme: Concealment, suffocation, transformation. Smoke obscures and corrupts.
smoke.description: Where fire meets earth, smoke is born — neither solid nor flame, a thing between states. Smoke magic inherits fire's hunger and earth's patience: it lingers, it blinds, it creeps into lungs and minds. The Smoking Mirror is its emblem: a surface that shows not the world but what the world hides.

mud.name: Mud
mud.theme: Corruption, weight, tenacity. Mud endures and smothers.
mud.description: Where earth and water meet without ceremony, mud is born — patient, heavy, and suffocating. Mud magic combines the endurance of earth with the corrosion of water: slow but relentless, hard to wash off.

cloud.name: Cloud
cloud.theme: Transience, sovereignty, height. Cloud moves freely, belongs nowhere, answers to no one.
cloud.description: Where water surrenders its weight to air, cloud is born — neither earth nor sky, neither solid nor gone. Cloud magic is the discipline of the in-between: it slips past barriers, sheds damage like rain, carries the party home on a breath of wind, and answers a call with something vast and serpentine that lives between the rain and the stars. The nagas who dwell in cloud are rare and sovereign; they do not welcome interruption, but they respect those who know how to approach.

steam.name: Steam
steam.theme: Purification, eruption, transformation. Steam cleanses and scalds.
steam.description: Where water meets fire, steam is born — neither liquid nor flame, a force that cleanses and scalds in equal measure. Steam magic purifies and erupts: healing mists that strip poison from allies, geysers that hurl enemies skyward, and lingering fog that sears those who linger.

rainbow.name: Rainbow
rainbow.theme: Prismatic chaos, revelation, transcendence. Rainbow dazzles and illuminates.
rainbow.description: Where space refracts through white light, rainbow is born — not one thing but all things at once, shimmering and impossible to hold. Rainbow magic is wildly unpredictable: each spell rolls its own dice, choosing from a palette of effects that might blind, charm, heal, or burn. Those who master it learn to see reality itself as a display of light.

tummo.name: Tummo
tummo.theme: Inner heat, yogic fire, self-transformation. Tummo burns from within.
tummo.description: Where fire meets air within the body, tummo is born — the inner heat of yogic practice, the flame that melts the crown and blazes upward from the secret chakra. Tummo magic transforms the caster rather than the world: resistance to the elements, transfer of vitality, and ultimately the blazing and dripping of the inner channels.

luminosity.name: Luminosity
luminosity.theme: Clear light, perception, mental mastery. Luminosity reveals and protects the mind.
luminosity.description: Where fire illuminates space, luminosity is born — not the light of sun or flame but the clear light of awareness itself. Luminosity magic grants vision that pierces all deception, an aura that shields the mind from manipulation, and illusions so vivid they confuse even those who know what they are seeing.

sound.name: Sound
sound.theme: Vibration, mantra, resonance. Sound shatters and commands.
sound.description: Where air vibrates through space, sound is born — not mere noise but the primordial vibration that shapes reality. Sound magic is the discipline of mantra and resonance: battle chants that sharpen the will, dirges that sap the spirit, sonic blasts that shatter armor and silence, and the legendary eleventh note that transcends all structure.
